narrative: Japan FinMin Katayama warns of decisive action on FX as USD/JPY holds 158.81; the 300bp Fed-BoJ carry sustains the bid, but a strong -1.52 put skew in 25d RR signals rising downside hedging demand. USD leads G8 (+0.52% avg) as US 10Y yields climb to 4.65%; gold lower -1.03% near $4,511; equities -0.15%; DXY +0.07%; VIX 17.8. Watch RBNZ rate decision May 27 at 02:00 UTC.
